name: narrative-ai
description: Neuro-symbolic narrative intelligence — fabula graphs, character arcs, and plot diagnostics for fiction
author: Samir Mohammed

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@narrative-ai/graph-schema --workspace=@narrative-ai/egoquest-fiction --workspace=@narrative-ai/narrative-engine && npm run dev --workspace=web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@narrative-ai/graph-schema && npm run build --workspace=@narrative-ai/egoquest-fiction && npm run build --workspace=@narrative-ai/narrative-engine && npm run build --workspace=web
